title: Career Agency, Success Criteria, and Search Constraints · Claim Audit: Work Boundaries
summary: A graduate is told to apply everywhere immediately, but has not defined acceptable work, financial runway, access needs, location, schedule, authorization, values, safety, or a stop rule. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the work boundaries increment in learner-owned career decision charter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: State ethical, safety, accessibility, privacy, employment-type, travel, location, and schedule boundaries before opportunity pressure appears.
Model time, money, energy, care, health, and learning capacity under conservative search scenarios and escalation thresholds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Work Boundaries · Theory Work Boundaries
steps.instruction:
theory case — A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: State ethical, safety, accessibility, privacy, employment-type, travel, location, and schedule boundaries before opportunity pressure appears.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Work Boundaries contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Work Boundaries · Theory Work Boundaries.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for state ethical, safety, accessibility, privacy, employment-type, travel, location, and schedule boundaries before opportunity pressure appears. For Predict Work Boundaries · Theory Work Boundaries, keep Work Boundaries connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A candidate with limited runway, caregiving duties, an access need, location limits, and two acceptable work arrangements is pressured to maximize application volume. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: State ethical, safety, accessibility, privacy, employment-type, travel, location, and schedule boundaries before opportunity pressure appears. A defensible solution applies Work Boundaries, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to learner-owned career decision charter.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Boundaries can be decided after accepting an offer. This fails the Work Boundaries contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
